home.verseTranslation: "And say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge." — Quran 20:114
home.headline: Structured Islamic Learning for the Ummah
home.subheadline: Not another app with prayer times. Tadabbur gives you a structured, progressive curriculum — from beginner to advanced — grounded in authentic scholarship. Free forever.
home.feature1Desc: Progressive tracks from beginner to advanced. Lessons build on each other — no random content dumps.
home.feature2Desc: Every lesson is reviewed and verified by qualified scholars before it goes live.
home.feature3Desc: Multilingual, open source, free forever. No paywalls, no subscriptions. Built by Muslims, for Muslims.
home.heroHeadline: Structured Islamic Learning for the Ummah
home.heroSub: Not another prayer app. Tadabbur gives you a rigorous, scholar-verified curriculum — from beginner to advanced — grounded in authentic knowledge. Free forever.
home.problemTitle: 1.8 billion Muslims. Zero platforms worth their time.
home.problemSub: Islamic learning has been stuck for a decade. Here is what every existing platform gets wrong.
home.pain1Desc: Dozens of apps, none with a coherent curriculum. You finish one video and have no idea what to learn next.
home.pain2Desc: Anyone can post anything. There is no review process, no vetting, and no way to know if a source is reliable.
home.pain3Desc: No progress tracking, no quizzes, no retention tools. You watch, forget, and start over.
home.diffTitle: This is different. Built for serious learners.
home.diffSub: Tadabbur was designed from the ground up to solve every one of these problems.
home.diff1Desc: Six progressive learning tracks. Each lesson builds on the last. You always know exactly where you are and what comes next.
home.diff2Desc: Every lesson is reviewed and approved by qualified scholars before publication. No guesswork, no unreliable sources.
home.diff3Desc: Ask questions about any lesson. Get context-aware answers grounded in the curriculum you are studying.
home.diff4Desc: No paywalls. No subscriptions. The code is public. The knowledge belongs to the Ummah — always.
home.roadmapSub: We are building this in public. Here is exactly what is planned and when.
home.phase1Desc: Auth, curriculum structure, lessons, progress tracking, and the reader.
home.phase2Desc: AI-powered Q&A grounded in verified curriculum content.
home.phase3Desc: Lesson comments, study groups, and peer interaction.
home.phase4Desc: Native iOS and Android apps with full offline access.
home.phase5Desc: Full CMS for scholars to write, review, and publish content.
home.phase6Desc: Full Arabic, Urdu, Turkish, Indonesian, and French localisation.
home.audienceTitle: Built for every Muslim on the path to knowledge
home.audience1Desc: Start from zero with structured beginner tracks that explain the fundamentals clearly and progressively.
home.audience2Desc: A guided curriculum that removes the overwhelm of starting your Islamic education from scratch.
home.audience3Desc: Go deeper. Advanced tracks in fiqh, aqeedah, Quran sciences, and seerah.
home.audience4Desc: Author, review, and publish lessons using our scholar-only authoring platform.
home.audience5Desc: Contribute to an open-source platform that serves the global Ummah.
home.openSourceTitle: Islamic knowledge belongs to the Ummah
home.openSourceSub: Tadabbur is free, open source, and will always remain so. No venture capital. No ads. No data harvesting. Built by Muslims who believe knowledge should be free.
home.finalSub: Join thousands of Muslims building a serious foundation of Islamic knowledge.
